objective: Add the trust and hardening layer through oversight, evidence-backed review, and reconciliation at session and nightly boundaries.

workstreams.name: Reconciliation loops
outputs: Layer 3 assisted Layer 4 grouping and promotion candidate detection

workstreams.name: QMD cleanup
outputs: stale notion demotion and expiration rules

exit_criteria: Oversight can review and intervene on semantic outputs.
Tentative memory can be upgraded, downgraded, or rejected at session boundaries.
Nightly maintenance hardens memory quality without changing the authority boundary.
risks: Letting oversight silently become the authority layer.
Letting approval-sensitive changes bypass evidence-backed review.
